query:
UPDATE media.tv_shows
           SET name           = $2,
               overview       = $3,
               poster_path    = $4,
               first_air_date = $5,
               status         = $6,
               genres         = $7,
               networks       = $8,
               meta_status    = 'ready',
               updated_at     = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1
